title: DeleteState
text: DeleteState Delete the specified occurrence in the USTATE table. "USYSSTAT".DeleteState ( SesstionId , $instancename , ) Table 1. Parameters Parameter Type Direction Value SesstionId string IN Unique session identifier that is generated by Uniface, and accessible using $webinfo("WEBSERVERCONTEXT"), SESSION . $instancename string IN Name of the server page component instance, returned by $instancename . Related Links $webinfo ("WebServerContext") The WebServerContext topic contains an associative list of properties that provide state information about the Uniface Server and the context in which it is running. $instancename Return the name of the current component instance.
